title: PersonaSpec
description: Agent capability specification. Validated and assembled by larva into canonical JSON.

system_prompt.description: System prompt text. Assembled from prompt components or provided directly. Null omits system prompt from LLM context.

tools_profile.description: Standalone mode: comma-separated tool preset names resolved from config.toml [tools.*] sections (e.g., 'filesystem,shell'). Combined mode (with CapabilityToken): passed through to tela unchanged as a single profile name. Null or omitted = no tool profile resolution.

node.description: Target execution node. Used by nervus for dispatch routing.

sandbox.description: Sandbox strategy reserved for future agent-process sandboxing. Does NOT participate in MCP sandbox decisions. Use --sandbox CLI flags for MCP server isolation.

scratchpad_ref.description: Logical scratchpad reference (not a filesystem path). Resolved by anima at runtime.

max_tokens.description: Per-turn max output tokens. Distinct from budget (total token limit across all turns).

model_params.description: LLM inference parameters passed to model provider. additionalProperties allows provider-specific params.

budget.description: Token budget limit. Enforced by anima runtime.

can_spawn.description: Spawn permission. false = forbidden, true = any persona, list of strings = only named personas allowed.

spec_id.description: Stable identifier ({name}@{short_hash}). Computed by larva; optional in raw input, always present in larva output. Survives prompt edits; changes only on structural mutation.

spec_digest.description: SHA-256 of canonical (sorted-key, no-whitespace) JSON output. Computed by larva; optional in raw input, always present in larva output.

spec_version.description: Schema version (semver). All consumers must reject unknown versions.
